bounded_scope: Harden /api/teacher/review-queue access auditing and default-deny scoped program-teacher visibility without direct Figma work.
changes: /api/teacher/review-queue now audits missing-session, denied-role, and viewed queue access as review_queue_unauthorized, review_queue_denied, and review_queue_viewed.
Review queue audit metadata now includes redacted actor role/scope records for authenticated users.
The program/cohort teacher SQL predicate now requires non-empty teacher scope IDs and non-empty student group program/cohort IDs before matching.
tests/review-loop.integration.test.mjs now covers missing-session audit, misc-admin denial audit, empty program-scope no-leak behavior, and the existing teacher review loop.
